python.name: Python
python.description: Python is a high-level, interpreted programming language known for its simplicity and readability. Created by Guido van Rossum in 1991.

machine_learning.name: Machine Learning
machine_learning.description: Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that enables systems to learn and improve from experience without being explicitly programmed.

llm.name: Large Language Models
llm.description: Large Language Models (LLMs) are AI models trained on vast amounts of text data to understand and generate human-like text.

quantum_computing.name: Quantum Computing
quantum_computing.description: Quantum computing uses quantum mechanical phenomena like superposition and entanglement to perform computations.

internet.name: History of the Internet
internet.description: The internet evolved from ARPANET in the 1960s to become a global network connecting billions of devices.
milestones: 1989: World Wide Web invented by Tim Berners-Lee
